title: U Hanedza nga Nḓila ya Mulalo, 1970s-1980s: U Bva kha Black Consciousness u Ya kha UDF
subject: History

sources.title: Congress of South African Trade Unions (COSATU)

slides.eyebrow: Ndima ya 12 Ḓivhazwakale - Phasi ya FET
slides.title: U Hanedza nga Nḓila ya Mulalo, 1970s-1980s
slides.lead: Nḓila ye u hanedza ha nga ngomu ha vusulusa ngayo vhahanedzi vha apartheid - u bva kha Black Consciousness na Soweto u ya kha UDF na maimo a khombo khulwane (states of emergency).

media.alt: Tshanḓa tsho farwaho tsho imaho nṱha ha mutalo wo omaho wo lalamaho, tshi tshi sumbedza u hanedza ha vhathu vhanzhi kha apartheid.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='128' width='320' height='52' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='150' y='60' width='20' height='72' rx='5' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='140' y='44' width='40' height='26' rx='8' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='138' y='40' width='9' height='20' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='150' y='36' width='9' height='24' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='162' y='38' width='9' height='22' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='40' y='150' width='240' height='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='262' cy='46' r='22' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Vhekanyani ndima. Nga ṅwaha wa vho-1960 u iletshwa ha ANC na PAC, Mulandu wa Rivonia na khathulo khulwane dza vhogireni zwo sia u hanedza ha nga ngomu ho fhelwa nungo. Ngudo iyi i sedza uri, u bva vhukovhelani ha vho-1960, gogwana ntswa ya u hanedza yo fhaṱa hafhu i tshi bva nga ngomu ha shango: u thoma ya mihumbulo (Black Consciousness), ndademo ya vhaswa (1976), vhashumi vho dzudzanyeaho (dzitshumba dza vhashumi), na mafheleloni fronti ya vhathu vhanzhi (UDF) ye mmuso wa lingedza u i pwashekanya nga mulayo wa khombo. Humbelani vhagudiswa uri vha dzule vha tshi vhudzisa: ndi nnyi ane a khou hanedza, nga nḓila-ḓe, nahone mmuso u fhindula hani?

slides.title: 'Ḓekedei ya u fhumula' na magumo ayo
slides.lead: Nga vhukovhelani ha vho-1960 apartheid yo vha i tshi vhonala yo khwaṱha - fhedzi u hanedza ho vha hu tshi khou dzudzanyea hafhu nga u fhumula.

blocks.text: Nga murahu ha Sharpeville (1960) mmuso wo ila **ANC** na **PAC**, wa vhofha vharangaphanḓa vha nga Nelson Mandela, nahone wa kombetshedza mishumo ya u lwela mbofholowo uri i pfulutshele nnḓa na fhasi ha shango. Ndademo dza vhathu vhanzhi dzi re khagala nga ngomu ha shango dzo pwashekanywa, nahone ṅwaha wa vho-1960 dziṅwe nga u wa vhidzwa 'ḓekedei ya u fhumula'.

items: Milayo ya tshiṱuhu yo tendela u valelwa hu si na khaṱhulo na u ilwa ha vhalweli.
Ikonomi yo hula, fhedzi Vhatema vha dzula vho valelwa nnḓa ha maanḓa a politiki.
U hanedza hutswa ho ḓo hula hu tshi bva kha matshudeni, vhashumi na vhadzulapo, hu si kha dzimirangaphanḓa dzo ilwaho.

slides.notes: Ombelani u bvela phanḓa na tshanduko. Vhagudiswa vho no vhona Sharpeville na u shandukela kha ndwa ya zwikwaramaanḓa kha ndima ya nga phanḓa. Ombelani uri u vusuluswa ha vho-1970 tshihulwane tsho vha tshi mafhungo a maṱhihelo matswa e a shuma nga mulayo kana hafhu-mulayo nga ngomu ha Afrika Tshipembe, ngauri maṱhihelo o ḓoweleaho o vha o ilwa. Hezwi zwi vhekanya uri ndi ngani Black Consciousness na dzitshumba dzo ḓiimisaho zwo vha na ndeme khulwane.

slides.title: Black Consciousness na Steve Biko
slides.lead: 'Tshikwara tshi re na maanḓa vhukuma tshanḓani tsha mutsikeledzi ndi ngelekanyo ya wo tsikeledzwaho.'

blocks.text: Vho neta nga politiki ya matshudeni yo rangwaho phanḓa nga vhatshena, matshudeni matema vho ṱutuwa vha bveledza **South African Students' Organisation (SASO)** nga 1969, Steve Biko a vha mupresidennde wa hone wa u thoma. Filosofi yavho, **Black Consciousness (BC)**, yo ṱuṱuwedza Vhatema vha Afrika Tshipembe uri vha lande ngelekanyo ya u ḓivhona vha si tshithu, vha ḓihudze nga vhuḓivho havho, nahone vha ḓivhofholole nga ngelekanyo phanḓa ha musi vha tshi ḓivhofholola nga politiki.

items: 'Mutema' wo ṱalusiwa nga politiki uri wo katela Vhatema vha Afrika, Vhakhethiwa (Coloured) na Vhaindia vho tsikeledzwaho nga apartheid.
Black People's Convention (1972) yo phaḓaladza mihumbulo ya BC kha vhadzulapo nga mishumo ya u ḓithusa.
BC yo ṋea murafho mutswa u ḓifulufhela na luambo lwa u hanedza.

media.alt: Ṱhoho yo shanduliwaho i vhonalaho lubadani, i na ḓuvha ḽi tshi bva nga ngomu, i tshi sumbedza mbofholowo ya ngelekanyo na u ḓihudza.

slides.notes: SASO yo thomiwa nga 1968 ya bveledzwa nga tshiofisi nga 1969 ngei Turfloop; dzulani no sedza kha 1969 sa musi wa u bviselwa khagala. Ṱalutshedzani BC sa mbofholowo ya ngelekanyo: u ḓihudza, u ḓiimisela na vhuthihi vhukati ha vho tsikeledzwaho. Ombelani u ṱaluswa hafhu ha politiki ha 'mutema' u fhaṱa vhuvha ha vhuphara. Sumbedzani phambano na maṱhihelo a kale: BC yo shuma khagala na nga mulayo tsha u thoma, zwe zwa vha zwiṅwe zwiitisi zwa u phaḓalala hayo nga u ṱavhanya kha zwifunzeeli na kha mireili na mishumo ya vhadzulapo.

slides.title: Ndademo ya Soweto
slides.lead: Ndademo ya matshudeni yo lwaho na Tshivenḓa tsha Afrikaans zwikoloni yo vha ndademo ya lushaka lwoṱhe.

blocks.text: Nga 1974 mmuso wo laya uri **Afrikaans** i shumiswe nga u lingana na Tshiisimane sa luambo lwa u guda zwikoloni zwa vhatema. Matshudeni, vhanzhi vho ṱuṱuwedzwaho nga Black Consciousness, vho vhona hezwi sa 'luambo lwa mutsikeledzi'. Nga **16 Fulwana 1976** zwigidi zwa matshudeni a Soweto vho tshimbila nga mulalo; maphulisa vho thoma u thutha nga zwigidi, ndademo ya phahaḓala ya vha ndademo khulwane ye ya phaḓalala shangoni ḽoṱhe.

items: Zwiṱatisiṱika zwa mmuso zwo bvisa vho faho vha 23 nga ḓuvha ḽa u thoma; nyembelelo dza murahu dzi na tshivhalo tshihulwane vhukuma.
Tshifanyiso tsha Hector Pieterson a tshi khou fa tsho vhewa mahungwaneni a shango ḽoṱhe.
Zwigidi zwa vhaswa vho pfulutshela nnḓa vha ḓilunga na mishumo ya u lwela mbofholowo.

media.alt: Mutevhe wa zwifanyiso zwa matshudeni zwi tshi khou tshimbila, hu na tshibammbiri tsho imaho nṱha.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='150' y='24' width='54' height='30' fill='#dcd3c2' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='176' y='54' width='4' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='40' cy='58' r='12'/><rect x='33' y='72' width='14' height='42'/><circle cx='84' cy='54' r='12'/><rect x='77' y='68' width='14' height='46'/><circle cx='128' cy='58' r='12'/><rect x='121' y='72' width='14' height='42'/></g><rect x='24' y='126' width='196' height='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Farani nyimele ya khakhathi nga vhuḓifhinduleli: sedzani lutamo lwa mulalo lwa matshudeni na maanḓa a si a linganaho e a shumiswa. Tshivhalo tsha vho faho tshi khou hanedzwa - redzani 23 dza mmuso dza ḓuvha ḽa u thoma ni tshi ombela nyembelelo khulwane dza vhaḓivhazwakale, ni songo shumisa tshivhalo tshithihi 'tsha u fhelela'. Ombelani mvelelo: u sasaladzwa ha shango ḽoṱhe, u anda ha vhaḓilungi kha ANC na PAC vha re nnḓa, na u swika ha vhaswa sa maanḓa a khoro kha ndwa. Vhofhani hafhu na Bantu Education ya ndima ya Ndima ya 9.

slides.title: Lufu lwa Biko na u ilwa ha 1977
slides.lead: Mmuso wo lingedza u vhulaha muhumbulo nga u fhumudza maṱhihelo awo.

blocks.text: **Steve Biko** o valelwa nahone a fela vhukoloni ha maphulisa nga **12 Khubvumedzi 1977** nga vhulwadze he a hu wana musi a tshi khou vhudzisiswa. Lufu lwawo lwo vusa mubvumo wa shango ḽoṱhe. Nga **19 Tshimedzi 1977** mmuso wo ila **maṱhihelo a Black Consciousness na o elanaho a re miṱengo ya 18**, o katela SASO na Black People's Convention, wa vala na dzigurannḓila dze dza vha dzi tshi khou ṅwala nga ha muṱhihelo.

items: Biko o vha luvhonela lwa shango lwa u hanedza na lwa vhuthithihadzi ha apartheid.
U ila maṱhihelo a songo pwashekanya mihumbulo ye a i phaḓaladza.
Vhalweli vhanzhi vho dzudzanyea hafhu nga dzitshumba dza vhashumi, dzikereke na mishumo ya vhadzulapo.

media.alt: Kherese i dukaho zwavhuḓi tsini na tshifhaṱo tsha tsimbi tsho vunḓekaho.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='72' y='70' width='20' height='60' fill='#dcd3c2'/><path d='M82 46 q10 12 0 22 q-10 -10 0 -22 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M120 74 a14 14 0 1 1 0 28 a14 14 0 0 1 0 -28 Z' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6'/><path d='M138 88 a14 14 0 1 0 12 0' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: U ṱoḓisisa lufu lwa Biko ho wana uri a hu na muthu we a vhewa mulandu, zwe zwoṱhe zwa vha tshiga tsha u sa lulama ha apartheid; ni nga bula hezwi ni tshi dzula ni tshi litsha zwidodombedzwa zwi tshi tea miṅwaha. Muhumbulo muhulwane wa u sengulusa: tshiṱuhu tsho kona u ila maṱhihelo na u vhulaha vharangaphanḓa, fhedzi Black Consciousness yo no shandula nḓila ye murafho wo humbula ngayo, nahone vhathu havho vho hwala ndwa vha i isa kha maṱhihelo matswa. Hezwi zwi ombela u rembuluwa ha dzitshumba dza vhashumi.

slides.title: Maanḓa a vhashumi vho dzudzanyeaho
slides.lead: Zwiipfi zwa u imisa mishumo na dzitshumba zwo shandula maanḓa a ikonomi u vha khakhathi ya politiki.

blocks.text: **Zwiipfi zwa Durban zwa 1973** - vhashumi vha zwigidi vha imisa mishumo - zwo sumbedza maanḓa a nyito ya vhathu vhoṱhe nahone zwa vusa gogwana ntswa ya dzitshumba dzo ḓiimisaho dza vhashumi vhatema. Idzi dzo hula nga ḓekedei, dza bveledza **Federation of South African Trade Unions (FOSATU)** nga 1979 nahone, nga Nyendavhusiku 1985, **Congress of South African Trade Unions (COSATU)** khulwane vhukuma.

items: COSATU yo bviselwa khagala nga 1 Nyendavhusiku 1985, Elijah Barayi a vha mupresidennde na Jay Naidoo a vha muṅwaleli muhulwane.
Dzitshumba dzo vhofhanya khumbelo dza muholo na ndwa khulwane ya u lwa na apartheid.
Zwiipfi na u dzula hayani (stayaways) zwo vha zwikwaramaanḓa zwihulwane nga vho-1980.

media.alt: Tshifhaṱo tsha fekthari tshi na tshigwada tsha zwifanyiso zwa vhashumi zwo imaho zwoṱhe phanḓa hatsho.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='150' y='50' width='74' height='70' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='166' y='30' width='14' height='24' fill='#5c6b40'/><rect x='160' y='66' width='16' height='16' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='186' y='66' width='16' height='16' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#8a1f1f'><circle cx='40' cy='70' r='12'/><rect x='33' y='84' width='14' height='36'/><circle cx='72' cy='70' r='12'/><rect x='65' y='84' width='14' height='36'/><circle cx='104' cy='70' r='12'/><rect x='97' y='84' width='14' height='36'/></g><rect x='20' y='120' width='204' height='8' fill='#c8b89a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Ṱalutshedzani ndi ngani dzitshumba dzo vha na ndeme: apartheid yo vha i tshi ḓitika nga mushumo wa vhatema, ngauralo vhashumi vho dzudzanyeaho vho kona u tshinya ikonomi na u kombetshedza dzinyambedzano. FOSATU (1979) yo fhaṱa sialala ḽa u sa vha na tshirunzi ḽa fhethu ha mushumo; COSATU (1985) yo ṱanganya vhaḓinwadzi vhanzhi vhukuma nahone ya ḓivhofha khagala na ndwa khulwane ya u lwela mbofholowo. Vhofhani na ḓekedei ya UDF: dzitshumba na mishumo ya vhadzulapo zwo ita mishumo zwoṱhe kha stayaways na zwiipfi.

slides.title: Palamennde ya Zwipiḓa Zwiraru (Tricameral Parliament)
slides.lead: 'Tshanduko' ye ya ṋea vhaṅwe voutu ya sia vhunzhi nnḓa.

blocks.text: Nga 1983 mmuso wo ḓivhadza ndayotewa ntswa ye ya bveledza **Tricameral Parliament** ya zwipiḓa zwiraru zwo fhambanaho: tshiṅwe tsha vhatshena, tshiṅwe tsha Vhakhethiwa (Coloured) na tshiṅwe tsha Vhaindia - fhedzi **hu si na u imelela na luthihi kha vhunzhi ha Vhatema vha Afrika**. Yo vha yo dzudzanyelwa u fhandekanya vho tsikeledzwaho na u ṋea apartheid tshifhaṱuwo tsha u ṱanganedzea.

items: Maanḓa a ngoho o dzula zwanḓani zwa vhatshena nga muvhalo wo remekanywaho.
Vhatema vha Afrika vho vha vha tshi tea u shumisa 'pfanelo' fhedzi kha Bantustans.
U nga ṱanganya vhahanedzi, yo vha ṱanganya kha ndademo.

media.alt: Zwibokisi zwiraru zwo fhambanaho zwa zwipiḓa, zwivhili zwiṱuku na tshithihi tshihulwane tshi langaho, hu na vhunzhi vho siwaho nnḓa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='20' y='40' width='56' height='60' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='86' y='55' width='46' height='45' fill='#a8bcae'/><rect x='142' y='55' width='46' height='45' fill='#a8bcae'/><g fill='#8a1f1f'><circle cx='206' cy='84' r='9'/><circle cx='222' cy='96' r='9'/><circle cx='210' cy='104' r='9'/></g><rect x='198' y='116' width='40' height='4' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='16' y='108' width='176' height='4' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Iyi ndi tshiitisi tshihulwane tsha u bveledzwa ha UDF. Itani muhumbulo wa u sengulusa nga u ṱavhanya: sisiṱeme ya Tricameral yo vha kubve ya u renga na u fhandekanya - u renga vharangaphanḓa vha Coloured na Vhaindia, u fara Vhatema vhoṱhe kha Bantustans. Vhudzisani vhagudiswa uri ndi ngani u sia vhunzhi nnḓa zwo ita uri 'tshanduko' i vhe vhukhakhi ha politiki. Yo ṋea u hanedza tshiṱisi tshithihi tsho ṱanganyaho vhathu.

slides.title: United Democratic Front
slides.lead: 'UDF unites, apartheid divides.' (UDF i ṱanganya, apartheid i fhandekanya.)

blocks.text: Nga **20 Ṱhangule 1983** vhathu vha tshi bvelela ho tou vha 10 000 vho kuvhangana ngei **Mitchells Plain**, Kapa, u bvisela khagala **United Democratic Front (UDF)**. Vha tshi fhindula mbidzo ya Reverend **Allan Boesak** ya u hanedza ndayotewa ya Tricameral, vharumelwa vha bvaho kha maṱhihelo a re miṱengo ya **565 o ḓiṱanganyaho** - civics, dzitshumba, dzikereke, magwada a matshudeni na a vhafumakadzi - vho ṱanganela kha vhuthihi vhuthihi vhuphara.

items: UDF yo ḓivhonadza khagala na zwipikwa zwa Freedom Charter na ANC yo bvaho nnḓa ha shango.
Vharangaphanḓa vho katela Albertina Sisulu, Archie Gumede na Popo Molefe.
Yo ṱanganyisa zwiipfi, stayaways na milingedzo ya vhathu vhanzhi shangoni ḽoṱhe.

media.alt: Zwifanyiso zwinzhi zwiṱuku zwo kuvhanganaho zwoṱhe fhasi ha bannde ḽithihi, zwi tshi sumbedza fronti yo ṱanganaho.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='70' y='22' width='100' height='30' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='118' y='52' width='4' height='30' fill='#5c1414'/><g fill='#8a1f1f'><circle cx='40' cy='96' r='9'/><circle cx='66' cy='90' r='9'/><circle cx='92' cy='98' r='9'/><circle cx='120' cy='90' r='9'/><circle cx='148' cy='98' r='9'/><circle cx='174' cy='90' r='9'/><circle cx='200' cy='96' r='9'/></g><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='53' cy='114' r='9'/><circle cx='79' cy='118' r='9'/><circle cx='107' cy='114' r='9'/><circle cx='135' cy='118' r='9'/><circle cx='163' cy='114' r='9'/><circle cx='189' cy='118' r='9'/></g><rect x='24' y='132' width='196' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/></svg>

slides.notes: UDF ndi mbuno khulwane ya u hanedza ha nga ngomu ha vho-1980. Ombelani vhudzudzanyi hayo - fronti ya maṱhihelo o ḓiimisaho a re miṱengo ya maḓana, hu si mirangaphanḓa muthihi - zwe zwa ita uri zwi konḓe kha mmuso u i ila. Yo vha i si na tshirunzi nahone yo ḓitika nga Freedom Charter, i tshi ita sa mufarisi wa nga ngomu wa ANC yo bvaho nnḓa. Ṱhogomelani madzina a vharangaphanḓa u anisa tshifanyiso u fhira muthu muthihi kana vhavhili, u katela vharangaphanḓa vha vhafumakadzi vha nga Albertina Sisulu.

slides.title: U hanedza nga nḓila ya mulalo, 1969-1986

events.label: SASO yo bviselwa khagala; Black Consciousness ya phaḓalala
Zwiipfi zwa Durban zwa vusulusa dzitshumba dza vhashumi
Biko o fela vhukoloni; maṱhihelo a BC o ilwa
Ndayotewa ya Tricameral; UDF yo bviselwa khagala
COSATU yo bveledzwa; imo ya khombo ya shango ḽoṱhe

slides.notes: Shumisani hezwi u ombedzela phanḓa ha zwislaiḓi zwa u fhedza zwa u sengulusa. Humbelani vhagudiswa uri vha tevhele phethareni: mihumbulo (1969), vhashumi (1973), vhaswa (1976), tshiṱuhu (1977), fronti ya vhathu vhanzhi (1983), khakhathi na vhusa ha khombo (1985-86). Sumbedzani uri phethara iṅwe na iṅwe yo fhaṱa kha ya u fhira - muṱhihelo wo hula wa vha muphara na wo dzudzanyeaho zwavhuḓi na fhasi ha tshiṱuhu tshihulwane.

slides.eyebrow: U sa laulea - na phindulo ya mmuso
slides.title: Maimo a khombo, 1985-1986
slides.lead: Musi maṱaudzi a tshi vuwa, mmuso wo laula nga ndaela ya khombo.

blocks.text: Nga Phando 1985 ANC yo bvaho nnḓa yo vhidzelela vhathu uri vha ite apartheid **'i sa lauleaho'**. Maṱaudzi o vuwa nga zwiipfi zwa rennde na zwa vharengi, zwiipfi zwa zwikolo, stayaways na u bveledzwa ha komiti dza dzitarati. Mmuso wo fhindula nga **imo ya khombo ya tshipiḓa nga 21 Fulwi 1985**, na **imo ya khombo ya shango ḽoṱhe nga 12 Fulwana 1986**.

items: Zwigidi zwo valelwa hu si na khaṱhulo, hu katelwa vhalweli vhanzhi vha UDF.
Mmbi yo dzhena maṱaudzini nahone kuṅwalele ho kanywa nga maanḓa.
Tshiṱuhu tsho fhungudza ndademo fhedzi tsho kunda u vhuyedza vhufanani ha apartheid.

media.alt: Tshifanyiso tsha goloi ya mmbi yo dzhenaho phanḓa ha nnḓu dza maṱaudzi murahu ha tshithivheli.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#b7a98d'><rect x='150' y='70' width='34' height='30'/><rect x='190' y='74' width='34' height='26'/></g><path d='M150 70 l17 -14 l17 14 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M190 74 l17 -12 l17 12 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M28 96 l14 -18 h60 l14 18 v22 h-88 Z' fill='#5c6b40'/><circle cx='48' cy='120' r='11' fill='#333'/><circle cx='96' cy='120' r='11' fill='#333'/><rect x='60' y='84' width='30' height='10' fill='#3f4a2c'/><rect x='20' y='130' width='204' height='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Mbidzo ya 'u sa laulea' yo bva kha tshiḓivhadzo tsha Oliver Tambo tsha Phando 1985. Ṱalutshedzani zwikwaramaanḓa zwa ndademo ya vhathu vhanzhi - zwiipfi, stayaways, maṱhihelo maṅwe a maṱaudzi - sa milingedzo ya u ita uri ndangulo ya apartheid i wele fhasi u bva fhasi. Nga zwenezwo ṱalutshedzani maimo a khombo sa milingedzo ya mmuso ya u pwashekanya hezwi nga u valela, mmbi na u kanya kuṅwalele. Muhumbulo muhulwane wa u sengulusa: tshiṱuhu tsho kona u thivhela ndademo tshifhinganyana fhedzi tsho engedza tshiga tsha u sa vha na vhufanani he tsha ṱuṱuwedza mmuso u ya kha dzinyambedzano nga 1990.

slides.title: Zwiipfi, stayaways na khakhathi ya machaba
slides.lead: U hanedza ho ṱanganyisa khakhathi ya u bva nga ngomu na nnḓa ha shango.

blocks.heading: Zwiipfi zwa vharengi na rennde
blocks.text: Vhadzulapo vho hana u renga kha dzivhengele dza vhatshena kana u badela rennde, vha tshi tshinya ikonomi na maṱhihelo a apartheid a hayani.

blocks.heading: Stayaways na zwiipfi zwa zwikolo
blocks.text: Vhashumi na matshudeni vho bvisa mushumo wavho na u ya zwikoloni, vha tshi sumbedza u landa apartheid ha vhathu vhanzhi.

blocks.heading: Khakhathi ya machaba
blocks.text: Vhukwara (sanctions), u ṱutshela u shela masheleni na zwiipfi zwa mitambo na zwa mvelele zwo iṱa Afrika Tshipembe nnḓa ha shango.

slides.notes: Sumbedzani nḓila ye khakhathi ya nga ngomu na ya nnḓa dza tikedzana ngayo. Zwiipfi zwa vharengi na rennde zwo shandula khethululo dza ḓuvhaḽiṅwe dza ikonomi u vha zwikwaramaanḓa zwa politiki nahone zwo vha zwo vhofhana zwavhuḓi na UDF na dzitshumba. Vhukwara ha machaba na tshiipfi tsha mitambo (sa tsumbo u vhulungwa Olimpikisi na u iṱwa nnḓa kha khirikhithi na ragby) zwo engedza mutengo wa apartheid nahone zwa engedza vhuḓifulufhedzi nga ngomu ha shango. Ṱuṱuwedzani vhagudiswa uri vha lelekanye uri tshiitisi tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tsho shela mulenzhe zwingafhani - phikisano ya mbuno ya FET yo ḓoweleaho.

slides.title: Muhumbulo we wa fhira miila
slides.lead: Black Consciousness yo amba uri mbofholowo i thoma ngelekanyoni.

blocks.text: Tshikwara tshi re na maanḓa vhukuma tshanḓani tsha mutsikeledzi ndi ngelekanyo ya wo tsikeledzwaho.

Vhuṱali ha Biko vhu ṱalutshedza uri ndi ngani u hanedza ha vho-1970 na vho-1980 ho vha na maanḓa nga u ralo. Musi vhathu vha tshi no landa lutendo lwa uri apartheid yo vha ya mupo kana ya tshoṱhe, a hu na ndaela ya u ila ye ya vhuya ya vhuyedza lwonolwo lutendo. Vhuḓifulufhedzi vhe ha fhaṱwa nga Black Consciousness ho ṋea nungo ndademo ya vhaswa ya 1976, dzitshumba dza vhashumi, na u dzudzanyea ha vhathu vhanzhi ha UDF.

slides.notes: Shumisani tshiredzwa u ṱanganya luvhungu. Mbuno khulwane ya ndima: tshiṱuhu tsho kona u ila maṱhihelo, u valela na u vhulaha vharangaphanḓa, fhedzi a tsho ngo kona u shandula murahu ngelekanyo ya politiki ya vhathu vha zwigidi zwa Afrika Tshipembe. Humbelani vhagudiswa uri vha vhofhanye tshiredzwa na zwiitea zwa fhasi ha zwivhili zwe zwa dzhielwa nṱha kha ngudo (sa tsumbo Soweto 1976 na UDF). Hezwi zwi ombela ndededzi ya phara i ḓitikaho nga vhuṱanzi ye khaṱhulo dza CAPS dzi i lambedza.

slides.title: Zwe ra guda - na mbudziso dza u fhindula
slides.lead: U hanedza ha nga ngomu ho fhaṱa hafhu u bva kha mihumbulo u ya kha nyito ya vhathu vhanzhi, nahone vhufanani ha apartheid ha wela fhasi hu sa londwi u anda ha tshiṱuhu.

blocks.text: Vhukati ha vhukovhelani ha vho-1960 na vhukati ha vho-1980, u hanedza ho pfuluwa u bva kha **Black Consciousness** u ya kha **ndademo ya 1976**, **u rembuluwa ha dzitshumba dza vhashumi**, na **u dzudzanyea ha vhathu vhanzhi ha UDF**. 'Tshanduko' ya Tricameral ya mmuso na maimo awo a khombo zwo kundelwa u wana vhufanani, zwa vhekanya fhethu ha dzinyambedzano magumoni a ḓekedei.

blocks.question: Ṱalutshedzani uri Black Consciousness yo shela mulenzhe hani kha u vusuluswa ha u hanedza nga vho-1970. Shumisani vhuṱanzi u tikedza phindulo yaṋu.
Ndi ngani United Democratic Front yo vha nḓila yo shumaho vhukuma ya u hanedza ha nga ngomu nga vho-1980?
'Maimo a khombo a 1985-1986 o khwaṱhisa apartheid nṱhani ha u i fhungudza.' Ni a tenda? Haseledzani.

slides.notes: Valani nga u vhofhanya dziphethara sa tshiitisi na mvelelo. Shumisani mbudziso tharu sa mishumo yo ḓitikaho nga tshiga kana ya u ṅwala hu re nga vhuphara; muvhalo wa mimaraga u edzisa maitele a phara na a mbuno a CAPS. Mbudziso ya u fhedza ya lwa mbuno yo itwa yo ṱoḓaho phikisano - lambedzani ndededzi yo kwaṱhaho ya khani i tikedzwaho nga vhuṱanzi ha ngudo. Sumbedzani ndima i tevhelaho: dzinyambedzano, u bviswa ha u ila ANC nga 1990, na nḓila i yaho kha 1994.
